rationale: This RewardSpec implements the five required components from the schema: distance_reward (negative distance to pad), velocity_penalty (negative speed), angle_penalty (negative absolute angle), fuel_efficiency (negative penalty for main engine use), and terminal (large positive for successful landing, large negative for crash/failure). Coefficients are set to balance early exploration with terminal shaping. The terminal component uses done to distinguish successful landing from crash.

components.description: Negative penalty proportional to Euclidean distance to landing pad (0,0)
Negative penalty for high linear speed
Small negative penalty each time main engine is fired

components.expression: float(done) * (100.0 if (next_obs[6] == 1.0 and next_obs[7] == 1.0 and np.sqrt(next_obs[2]**2 + next_obs[3]**2) < 0.1 and abs(next_obs[4]) < 0.1 and np.sqrt(next_obs[0]**2 + next_obs[1]**2) < 0.1) else -100.0)
components.description: Large positive reward for successful landing, large negative penalty for crash/failure
